channel.title: Sonnet-141 - slug - Charles Chin's Blog

item.title: Sonnet 141
item.description: The article discusses Sonnet 141 by William Shakespeare, which explores the speaker’s unconventional love for someone despite their flaws. The speaker explains that they do not love with their eyes or other senses but with their heart. They acknowledge the person’s imperfections but still choose to adore them. The article also provides a Chinese translation of the sonnet.

The speaker explains that they do not love with their eyes or other senses but with their heart. They acknowledge the person’s imperfections but still choose to adore them. The article also provides a Chinese translation of the sonnet.
